items.title: Turn messy workflows into deployed systems
items.summary: I work from operational context to backend design: clarify the workflow, identify service boundaries, and ship the first reliable version.
capabilities: Workflow discovery with users and delivery teams
proofPoints: Supported warehouse management workflows at IKEA
Built platforms across healthcare, compliance, and document verification

items.title: Build production backend and event platforms
items.summary: I build Go services, gRPC APIs, message routing, and event-driven workflows for systems that need to move data reliably.
capabilities: Kafka, Google Pub/Sub, and Azure Service Bus
proofPoints: Built services processing terabytes of manufacturing data weekly
Designed event-driven microservices across heterogeneous messaging systems

items.title: Make delivery secure and operable
items.summary: I help teams ship backend systems with deployment automation, vulnerability scanning, compliance remediation, and observability in the loop.
proofPoints: Achieved zero open compliance issues in enterprise delivery
Reduced security incidents by 30% through audits and vulnerability reviews
